chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Jail Appeal No.S-18 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 31.10.2022 Mr. Badal Gahoti, advocate for appellant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. ----- Learned defense counsel submits that this appeal has already become infructuous as appellant after completing entire sentence has been released from Jail on 06.09.2022, which is otherwise evident from letter dated 07.09.2022. In view of above, this appeal having served its purpose in the manner, as above, is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
